wie.title: Who we are
body: Studievereniging Innovatie en Technologie (SIT) is the student association for HBO-ICT students at the Amsterdam University of Applied Sciences. We process your personal data when you become a member or use our site.
Controller: the SIT board. Reachable at {email}, {venue}, {street}, {postal}.

gegevens.title: What data we process
body: When you sign up and use your account we process:
list: Student number (only if you are a student, optional)
Your committee preference and membership status

doel.title: What we use it for
body: We use your data only to manage your membership, give you access to events and the member portal, and to communicate with you about SIT. We never sell your data to third parties.

betaling.title: Payments
body: Payments for your membership and tickets run through Stripe. We do not receive full card details; those are processed securely by Stripe. We do keep a payment reference so we can activate your membership.

verwerkers.title: Who we share it with
body: We work with a few processors that run our platform:
list: Vercel - hosting of the website and cookieless analytics

cookies.title: Cookies
body: We use only strictly necessary, functional cookies. A session cookie keeps you logged in after you sign in. It is needed to make the site work and falls under the exception of the cookie law, so we do not ask consent for it.
Our analytics (Vercel Analytics and Speed Insights) work without cookies and without being able to identify you. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

bewaartermijn.title: How long we keep it
body: We keep your data as long as you are a member. Want us to delete your account and data? Send a mail to {email} and we sort it out.

rechten.title: Your rights
body: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, correct and delete your data, and you can object to processing. Mail {email} and we respond as soon as possible. Not satisfied? You can file a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority.
